props.className: mx-auto max-w-3xl px-4 sm:px-6 py-12 md:py-16

children.text: We collect information you provide when placing orders, creating an account, or contacting us. This includes name, email, address, and payment details.
We use this information to process orders, improve our services, and communicate with you. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
You may request access to or deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
